pharma.title: Medicine Nobel to trio who identified immune system's 'security guards'
pharma.summary: The discoveries by Mary Brunkow and Fred Ramsdell of the United States and Japan's Shimon Sakaguchi have been decisive for understanding how the immune system functions and why we do not all develop serious autoimmune diseases.

providers.title: Burjeel Holdings’ Tajmeel partners with Türkiye’s Suzermed Clinic to launch specialized hair transplant clinic in UAE
